{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Tyrakki Desert
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tyrakki Desert]] is a location where survival tactics include camouflage and hypnotic auras.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
